servinfo.title: Front and Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder Removal and Installation
Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder Removal and Installation

attention3.ptxt: Wheel speed sensor encoder is an integral part of wheel hub assembly. Replace wheel hub assembly if wheel speed sensor encoder is defective.

servinfosub.title: Front Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder
servinfosub.ptxt: Check front wheel speed sensor encoders for crack, damage, or deformation.
Replace front wheel hub assembly if defective.

servinfosub.title: Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Encoder
servinfosub.ptxt: Check rear wheel speed sensor encoder, referring to Front and Rear Wheel Speed Sensor On-Vehicle Inspection .
